title: 2 Pack Stainless Steel Tea Bag Squeezer Tongs - Non-Slip Grip Teabag Clips for Ice/Sugar Cubes, Durable Tea Accessories with Easy Clean, Rust-Proof Design for Tea Lovers
features: 🍵🍵 Package Contents: You will receive 2 tea bag squeezing tongs, designed to safely remove tea bags from hot tea and prevent tea bags from being soaked in water for too long, causing the tea to have an overly strong flavor.

🍵🍵 Material: This tea bag squeezing tongs are made of high-quality stainless steel material with excellent durability and rust resistance. They won't bend or break easily and are dishwasher, making them very convenient to use.

🍵🍵 Exquisite design: Our tea bag squeezing tongs measure approximately 12cm x 3.5cm, mini and lightweight, easy to carry and store. The tongs are designed with a colander on one side to squeeze excess liquid out of the tea bag, helping you control the strength of your tea. This design is not only convenient, but also very practical.

🍵🍵Wide range of uses: This tea bag squeezing tongs are not only suitable for squeezing and taking out tea bags, but can also be used to pick up ice cubes and sugar cubes. It is very suitable for use in homes, offices, teahouses and other occasions. Its multifunctional design makes it a great assistant in your tea drinking process, helping you stay tidy and comfortable while enjoying your tea.

❤️ ❤️100% Satisfactory Service: We are committed to providing our customers with the best products and best service! If you have any questions or problems with our products, please feel free to contact us. We will get back to you within 24 hours and provide you with a solution (refund or resend).
description: Product Description Product Description Designed with a solid plate and a strainer plate, so you can easily extract every last drop of flavor and then throw the bag away without any mess. This tea bag tong is a good helper for clamp tea bag during your afternoon tea-time, also perfect for clamp lemon slices, herb bags or other little food materials.
